name: xsolla-ai-kit
description: Xsolla agent skills toolkit — guided, end-to-end workflows for merchant setup, catalog design, Login/NewID, Pay Station, webhooks, storefront build, and shop branding, calling Xsolla REST APIs directly.

interface.shortDescription: Guided Xsolla workflows from zero to a live game shop
interface.longDescription: Bundles every Xsolla workflow skill: shop-setup (orchestrator), merchant-setup, catalog-design, login-setup, headless-checkout-integration, webhooks-impl. Skills call Xsolla REST APIs directly — no CLI dependency.
